No explanation of why trends occur

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Only lists products without identifying overarching patterns  
2. FAIL - No explanation of why trends occur  
3. FAIL - No explicit cross-reference among different source types  
4. FAIL - No synthesized insight beyond enumeration  
5. FAIL - No mention of limitations or counterarguments  
6. FAIL - Lacks specific evidence-based recommendations

tier_b_items.reason: Missing clear intro, analysis, and conclusion structure
Abrupt start, no transitions between sections
Formatting appears consistent across product listings
Tone professional, free of AI filler phrases

details.raw_judge_output:
1. FAIL - Missing clear intro, analysis, and conclusion structure  
2. FAIL - Abrupt start, no transitions between sections  
3. FAIL - Includes meta-commentary like "Let me compile..."  
4. PASS - Formatting appears consistent across product listings  
5. FAIL - No concluding synthesis section shown  
6. PASS - Tone professional, free of AI filler phrases
